evals.description: Triggers on Remotion project setup question
evals.prompt: How do I create a new Remotion project to make programmatic videos?
How do I animate text fading in using Remotion's useCurrentFrame?
How do I render my Remotion composition to an MP4 file?

evals.description: Can write a basic Remotion composition with fade-in animation
evals.prompt: Write a Remotion component that fades in a title over 1 second at 30fps with a slide-up effect.

evals.description: Can write a multi-scene composition using Series
evals.prompt: Write a Remotion video with three scenes that play one after another, each lasting 2 seconds at 30fps.

evals.description: Can write a spring animation for bouncy entrance
evals.prompt: Write a Remotion component that uses spring() to animate a card scaling in with a bouncy effect.

evals.description: Can set up audio with volume fade in/out
evals.prompt: Write a Remotion component that plays background music with a volume fade-in over the first second and fade-out over the last second.

evals.description: Gotcha: warns about missing extrapolateRight clamp
evals.prompt: I wrote interpolate(frame, [0, 30], [0, 1]) but my opacity goes above 1 after frame 30. Why?

evals.description: Gotcha: warns about using setTimeout in Remotion
evals.prompt: Can I use setTimeout to delay an animation in my Remotion video?

evals.description: Gotcha: warns about delayRender timeout for async data
evals.prompt: My Remotion video loads data from an API but sometimes renders blank. What am I doing wrong?

evals.description: Anti-hallucination: does not recommend using Math.random without seed
evals.prompt: How do I add random particle positions in my Remotion video?

evals.description: Anti-hallucination: recommends OffthreadVideo over Video for rendering
evals.prompt: Should I use the Video or OffthreadVideo component in Remotion for embedding video clips?

evals.description: References load: skill references animation-patterns file
evals.prompt: Where can I find detailed patterns for staggered cascades and parallax animations in Remotion?
